final:
// // Active-high reset feature. Output is set to 1 on rising edge of clock when reset is high.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input din,
  output reg dout,
  input reset_n
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      dout <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
      dout <= din;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Active-high reset feature. Output is set to 1 on rising edge of clock when reset is high.
